original_image_tags: The remainder of the page consists of extremely faint, illegible text bleed-through from the reverse side of the document. No other distinct text, drawings, or clear annotations are discernible on this face of the page.

elements.description: Page containing multiple overlapping ink stamps with legible text including 'RECEIVED - BOARDMAN', 'JAN 6 4:31 PM '55', 'JAN 6 3:05 PM '55', 'JAN 7 9:40 AM '55', 'U S DEPT OF JUSTICE', and 'FBI'. The main body of the page consists of faint, illegible reversed text bleeding through from the other side.

judge.reason: Description B quotes multiple specific stamp texts (e.g., 'RECEIVED - BOARDMAN', 'FBI') that Description A states are not discernible or absent, creating a direct contradiction on the presence and content of visual elements.
